collected.policy_snippet: images and videos collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services;
collected.purpose: To provide and continually improve products and services, including voice, image and camera services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy describes broad collection of physical data such as location, images, and voice for general purposes like improving services without specifying concrete limits on the scope or necessity of the data collected.

stored.policy_snippet: We receive and store any information you provide in relation to Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: To provide and continually improve products and services.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: If you choose automatic deletion after 3 or 18 months, we will delete the voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests associated with a chat once the specified period of time has passed

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below and with subsidiaries Amazon.com, Inc. controls
shared.purpose: Fulfilling orders, delivering packages, providing marketing assistance, and other service functions.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Amazon collects extensive physical data including location, images, and voice recordings, which is stored and shared with third parties for service improvement and advertising. While deletion options exist for some data like voice recordings, the broad scope of collection and sharing presents privacy risks.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide and continually improve our products and services, including recommendations, personalization, and advertising.
collected.legal_basis: By using Amazon Services, you are consenting to the practices described in this Privacy Notice.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states purposes for collection but does not explicitly claim to limit collection to only what is necessary, using broad terms like 'continually improve' without concrete limits on the scope of behavioral data gathered.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: To provide and continually improve our products and services.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: Yes, you can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months), or you can choose to not save any voice recordings.
retention_policy.policy_snippet_inactivity: If you choose automatic deletion after 3 or 18 months, we will delete the voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests associated with a chat once the specified period of time has passed since your last request to Alexa within that chat.

shared.policy_snippet: Third-Party Service Providers: We employ other companies and individuals to perform functions on our behalf. Examples include ... analyzing data, providing marketing assistance... These third-party service providers have access to personal information needed to perform their functions, but may not use it for other purposes.
shared.purpose: To perform functions on our behalf such as analyzing data and providing marketing assistance.
shared.legal_basis: By using Amazon Services, you are consenting to the practices described in this Privacy Notice.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Extensive automatic collection of browsing and interaction data occurs for personalization and advertising. Data is shared with third-party service providers for analysis and marketing, and international transfers occur under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
